deep_dive.title: DiFA: Inference-Time Forward-Process Alignment for Diffusion Models
deep_dive.abstract: The prevailing inference framework for diffusion models formulates generation fundamentally as a problem of numerical integration. This perspective casts the model as an exact estimator, neglecting the inherent statistical uncertainty of the denoising process. In this work, we propose Forward-Process Aligned Diffusion prediction (\textbf{DiFA}), a training-free framework that reframes inference-time data prediction refinement as a sequential state estimation problem. Rather than reusing past outputs solely for numerical integration, DiFA treats iterative data predictions along the reverse trajectory as correlated observations to build a forward-aligned temporal consensus. Inspired by Kalman filtering, this consensus aggregates historical predictions according to structural consistency and noise-level compatibility. To counteract the over-smoothing tendency of temporal consensus, we introduce a deviation guidance mechanism to adaptively preserve residual details. Empirically, DiFA yields significant improvements on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet across the evaluated metrics, including FID, IS, and FD-DINOv2, demonstrating that aligning inference with the forward statistical structure substantially improves generative fidelity.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Training-free framework refines data predictions by aggregating historical observations, reducing inference steps.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 训练无关框架通过聚合历史预测来精炼数据预测，减少推断步骤。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 训练无关框架通过聚合历史预测来精炼数据预测，减少推断步骤。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 训练无关框架通过聚合历史预测来精炼数据预测，减少推断步骤。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: DiFA reframes diffusion inference as sequential state estimation, aggregating past predictions with Kalman-filter-inspired consensus. This training-free method improves generation quality and reduces required sampling steps, accelerating inference without retraining.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 扩散模型的标准推断框架忽视了去噪过程中的统计不确定性。本文提出DiFA，一个训练无关的框架，将推断时数据预测精炼视为序列状态估计问题，受卡尔曼滤波启发聚合历史预测形成时间一致。实验表明，该方法在保持或提升生成质量的同时，减少了所需采样步数，从而加速了推理过程。这为训练无关的扩散模型加速提供了新范式。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 扩散模型的标准推断框架忽视了去噪过程中的统计不确定性。本文提出DiFA，一个训练无关的框架，将推断时数据预测精炼视为序列状态估计问题，受卡尔曼滤波启发聚合历史预测形成时间一致。实验表明，该方法在保持或提升生成质量的同时，减少了所需采样步数，从而加速了推理过程。这为训练无关的扩散模型加速提供了新范式。

deep_dive.title: ROMS-IMLE: A Minimalist Approach to Competitive Single-Step Generative Modelling
deep_dive.abstract: Generative models have undergone many generations of evolution, from VAEs/GANs to diffusion/flow matching. Along the way, the underlying techniques have become more complicated and various beliefs about what drives strong empirical performance have taken hold. Due to the success of diffusion models and flow matching, one of the more common beliefs is the importance of transforming the noise distribution to the data distribution gradually through many small transformations. We ask whether this is truly necessary, and take a minimalist approach to designing a competitive generative model. We start with the bare-bones essentials, namely just a training objective and a model. We purposefully make both simple. For the training objective, we choose Implicit Maximum Likelihood Estimation (IMLE), and eschew more complicated alternatives such as variational inference, adversarial training and numerical integration. For the model, we eschew transformers and instead choose a moderately sized convolutional network. Then we judiciously added elements that are truly essential, which surprisingly do not include iterative denoising. The result is a single-step parameter-efficient generative model that produces high quality samples at fast speed: it achieves an FID of 2.56 on ImageNet 256 and simultaneously attains good precision and recall.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Proposes a single-step generative model that bypasses multi-step diffusion, achieving competitive performance.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出单步生成模型，绕过多步扩散，实现有竞争力的性能。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出单步生成模型，绕过多步扩散，实现有竞争力的性能。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出单步生成模型，绕过多步扩散，实现有竞争力的性能。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: ROMS-IMLE challenges the necessity of multi-step transformations in diffusion models, proposing a minimalist single-step training objective and architecture. It achieves competitive generative performance while requiring only one step, drastically accelerating inference.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 当前扩散模型普遍认为需要逐步将噪声变换为数据分布。本文质疑这一观念，提出极简单步生成方法ROMS-IMLE，仅需简单的训练目标和模型结构，即可实现与多步扩散相竞争的生成质量。实验证明，单步生成在图像生成任务上达到令人满意的效果，大幅加速了推断速度。这一发现挑战了扩散模型必须多步采样的假设，为加速生成建模开辟了新方向。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 当前扩散模型普遍认为需要逐步将噪声变换为数据分布。本文质疑这一观念，提出极简单步生成方法ROMS-IMLE，仅需简单的训练目标和模型结构，即可实现与多步扩散相竞争的生成质量。实验证明，单步生成在图像生成任务上达到令人满意的效果，大幅加速了推断速度。这一发现挑战了扩散模型必须多步采样的假设，为加速生成建模开辟了新方向。

deep_dive.title: Provable diffusion-based posterior sampling for linear inverse problems via DDIM
deep_dive.abstract: Diffusion-based methods have achieved remarkable empirical success in solving inverse problems. However, many existing posterior samplers either lack rigorous theoretical guarantees or incur substantial computational overhead. We propose a simple and efficient algorithm, called \pddim, for solving linear inverse problems with diffusion priors via a DDIM-type sampler. Our method requires only lightweight, coordinate-wise modifications to the standard DDIM update, while explicitly incorporating the measurement model. The key idea is to perform posterior sampling separately along each singular direction of the measurement operator: for each direction, the sampler follows the learned diffusion prior when the observation signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) is below the corresponding diffusion SNR, and switches to a calibrated measurement-based predictor otherwise. We prove that the proposed sampler converges to the Bayesian posterior conditioned on the measurements. Empirical results show that the proposed sampler performs favorably against existing diffusion-based posterior samplers across a range of image restoration tasks, achieving the best performance on the majority of evaluation metrics considered. Overall, our results convert posterior sampling for noisy linear inverse problems to simple coordinate-wise DDIM updates, yielding an efficient, easy-to-implement algorithm with provable posterior consistency.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: proposes efficient DDIM-based posterior sampling for linear inverse problems, reducing computational overhead
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出基于DDIM的高效后验采样算法用于线性逆问题，降低计算开销
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出基于DDIM的高效后验采样算法用于线性逆问题，降低计算开销
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出基于DDIM的高效后验采样算法用于线性逆问题，降低计算开销
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes pDDIM, a lightweight modification to DDIM for efficient posterior sampling in linear inverse problems, requiring only coordinate-wise changes and no extra training.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 扩散模型求解逆问题时后验采样计算量大。提出pDDIM算法，通过对标准DDIM更新进行轻量坐标修正来融入测量模型，实现高效后验采样。该方法无需额外训练，在降低计算开销的同时保持理论保证。实验验证其速度与效果优势。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 扩散模型求解逆问题时后验采样计算量大。提出pDDIM算法，通过对标准DDIM更新进行轻量坐标修正来融入测量模型，实现高效后验采样。该方法无需额外训练，在降低计算开销的同时保持理论保证。实验验证其速度与效果优势。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: speedup techniques for diffusion model inference
